info.title: Ethereal Exchange API
info.description:
Ethereal HTTP API for real-time trading, order management, and market data access.

For more details, see [docs.ethereal.trade](https://docs.ethereal.trade).

get.summary: Returns a list funding rates for a product over a time period

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Direction to paginate through objects

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of objects to return

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pointer to the current object in pagination dataset

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Id representing the registered product

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: The range of time of funding rates to retrieve

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Order by field

get.summary: Returns a list of projected funding rates for the given products

parameters.name: productIds
parameters.description: Array of product ids

get.summary: Returns a signer by its address

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address of linked signer

post.summary: Extends the expiry of a linked signer (signed by the signer itself)
Links a signer address with the sender address for order delegation

get.summary: Returns the current signer config for a subaccount

parameters.name: subaccountId
parameters.description: Id representing the registered subaccount

post.summary: Refreshes the expiry of a linked signer (signed by EOA, supports expired signers)

delete.summary: Revokes a signer address from a subaccount

get.summary: Returns a signer by its id
Returns the current maintenance mode status
Returns a filtered array of orders by the subaccount

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Direction to paginate through objects

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of objects to return

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pointer to the current object in pagination dataset

parameters.name: subaccountId
parameters.description: Id of the subaccount to query for

parameters.name: clientOrderId
parameters.description: Client-generated order id to query for (either a valid UUID or alphanumeric string up to 32 characters)

parameters.name: productIds
parameters.description: Array of product ids to filter for

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Filter by orders created after timestamp exclusive (ms since Unix epoch)

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Filter by orders created before timestamp inclusive (ms since Unix epoch)

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Side of the order to filter for

parameters.name: close
parameters.description: Whether the order is a position close order

parameters.name: stopTypes
parameters.description: Array of StopTypes to filter by

parameters.name: isWorking
parameters.description: Filter by orders that are working: NEW, FILLED_PARTIAL

parameters.name: isPending
parameters.description: Filter by orders that are PENDING

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Order by field

post.summary: Cancels one or more orders given an array of order ids
Submits a dry-mode to simulate an order submission

parameters.name: productIds
parameters.description: Array of product ids to filter for

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Filter by order fills created before timestamp exclusive (ms since Unix epoch)

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Filter by order fills created before timestamp inclusive (ms since Unix epoch)

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Side of the maker as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Order by field

parameters.name: includeSelfTrades
parameters.description: Explicitly include self trades (excluded by default)

parameters.name: expandSelfTrades
parameters.description: When true and includeSelfTrades is also true, returns both maker and taker perspectives for self-trades as separate rows.

get.summary: Checks if an address is whitelisted

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address of account

linkedSignerRefreshHoursBeforeExpiry.description: Hours before expiry when a signer can be refreshed

linkedSignersUsedInPeriod.description: Number of signers linked within current ratelimit period

maxLinkedSignersInPeriod.description: Max number of signers that can be linked within ratelimit period

maxLinkedSignersPeriodDays.description: Ratelimit period in days for linking signers per account

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

intent.description: Intent of the message (action to be taken)

sender.description: Account address that produced the authorizing signature

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

CancelOrderDto.description: Cancel order request containing signature and cancel data

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

clientOrderIds.description: Client order IDs to cancel (UUIDs or alphanumeric up to 32 chars)

nonce.description: Unique nonce for this request (nanoseconds since Unix epoch)

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

CancelOrderResultDto.description: Individual cancel result for each order

clientOrderId.description: Client order ID (if order was found by clientOrderIds)

id.description: Order ID (if order was found by orderIds)

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

intent.description: Intent of the message (action to be taken)

sender.description: Account address that produced the authorizing signature

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

verifyingContract.description: Address of the contract that will verify the signature

version.description: Current major version of the signing domain

code.description: Code indicating a result of the dry run

marginAvailable.description: Margin available excluding this order in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

marginRequired.description: Margin required for order in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

riskAvailable.description: Risk available for the product in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

riskUsed.description: Risk used including position and open orders in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

totalUsedMargin.description: Total used margin including this order in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

code.description: Code indicating the reason for failure

marginAvailable.description: Margin available excluding this order in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

marginRequired.description: Margin required for order in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

riskAvailable.description: Risk available for the product in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

riskUsed.description: Risk used including position and open orders in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

totalUsedMargin.description: Total used margin including this order in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

data.description: Details of the failed dry run

message.description: Code indicating the reason for failure

EIP712AuthIntent.description: Intent of the message (action to be taken)

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

nonce.description: Message nonce timestamp (nanoseconds since Unix Epoch)

sender.description: Address of the linked signer extending itself

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

createdAt.description: Funding charge timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

pointsPerRow.description: Points consumed per row in paginated response

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

amount.description: Amount to withdraw in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

lzDestinationAddress.description: Bytes32 encoded LayerZero destination address (with 0x prefix, left zero padded)

lzDestinationEid.description: LayerZero destination endpoint ID for the transfer (zero if not bridging)

nonce.description: Message nonce timestamp (nanoseconds since Unix Epoch)

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

token.description: Address of token to be withdrawn

LayerZeroEndpointId.description: LayerZero destination endpoint ID for the transfer (zero if not bridging)

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

signerSignature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

name.description: Optional name for the linked signer

nonce.description: Message nonce timestamp (nanoseconds since Unix Epoch)

sender.description: Account address that produced the authorizing signature

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

signer.description: Address of signer to allowed for delegated signing

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

ListOfCancelOrderResultDtos.description: Response returned when cancel request is processed

data.description: Results for each order cancelation attempt
Array of points season summary objects

isEnabled.description: Whether the maintenance mode is enabled

asks.description: An array of ask tuple pairs (price, quantity) ordered in asc

bids.description: An array of bid tuple pairs (price, quantity) ordered in desc

previousTimestamp.description: Previous book update, undefined if never updated (ms since Unix Epoch)

timestamp.description: Most recent book update, created timestamp if never updated (ms since Unix Epoch)

bestAskPrice.description: Best ask price in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

bestBidPrice.description: Best bid price in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

oraclePrice.description: Oracle price in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

price24hAgo.description: Price of product 24hrs ago in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

availableQuantity.description: Remaining quantity (if modified or reduced) in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

clientOrderId.description: A subaccount scoped unique client-generated order id (either a UUID or alphanumeric string up to 32 characters)

close.description: Order closes the entire current position

createdAt.description: Order creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

expiresAt.description: Order expiry timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

filled.description: Filled amount in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

groupContingencyType.description: Type of OTOCO relationship (OTO or OCO)

groupId.description: Id of the group this order belongs to

postOnly.description: Only add order if it does not immediately fill (limit only)

price.description: Limit price in native units expressed as a decimal, zero if market order (precision: 9)

productId.description: Id of product this order was placed against

quantity.description: Original quantity (as per order submission) in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

reduceOnly.description: Indicates if the order is reduce only

sender.description: Account or linked signer address that placed this order

side.description: Side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

stopPrice.description: Stop price expressed as a decimal (zero if not a stop order, precision: 9)

stopPriceType.description: Type of stop price (stop orders only)

stopType.description: Stop type, either GAIN (0) for take-profit or LOSS (1) for stop-loss

subaccountId.description: Id of the subaccount associated to order

updatedAt.description: Order last updated timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

clientOrderId.description: A subaccount scoped unique client-generated order id (either a UUID or alphanumeric string up to 32 characters)

createdAt.description: Fill creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

feeUsd.description: The provided subaccount's charged fee in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

filled.description: Quantity filled in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

isMaker.description: Indicates if the fill was a maker or taker

orderId.description: Id of the order (from the context of the specified subaccount)

price.description: Fill price in expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

productId.description: Id of product the order fill was made against

reduceOnly.description: Indicates if the fill is reduce only

side.description: Side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

subaccountId.description: Id of the subaccount associated to order fill

type.description: The provided order's type e.g. MARKET or LIMIT

data.description: Array of funding rate history objects

createdAt.description: Points period creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

endedAt.description: End of points period (ms since Unix Epoch)

id.description: Id representing the points period entry

name.description: Optional name for the points period

points.description: Points earned in this period (excluding referral points) expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

referralPoints.description: Referral points earned in this period expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

startedAt.description: Beginning of points period (ms since Unix Epoch)

updatedAt.description: Points period last update timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

createdAt.description: Points season summary creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

id.description: Id representing the summary of points in this season

previousReferralPoints.description: Referral points earned in this season before most recent distribution expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

previousTotalPoints.description: Total points earned (excluding referral points) before most recent distribution expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

referralPoints.description: Referral points earned in this season expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

tier.description: Account tier derived based on activity this season

totalPoints.description: Total points earned (excluding referral points) in this season expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

updatedAt.description: Points season summary last update timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

PointsTier.description: Account tier derived based on activity this season

cost.description: Current cost of the position in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

createdAt.description: Position creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

feesAccruedUsd.description: Fees accrued in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

fundingAccruedUsd.description: Charged and applied funding on position, negative if paid, expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

fundingUsd.description: Charged but unapplied funding on position, negative if paid, expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

liquidationPrice.description: Product price at the time of liquidation (undefined if not liquidated, precision: 9)

productId.description: Id of product to this position belongs to

realizedPnl.description: Realized PnL in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

side.description: Side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

size.description: Position size in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

totalDecreaseNotional.description: Cumulative USD value of all position decreases expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

totalDecreaseQuantity.description: Cumulative quantity of all position decreases expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

totalIncreaseNotional.description: Cumulative USD value of all position increases expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

totalIncreaseQuantity.description: Cumulative quantity of all position increases expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

unrealizedPnl.description: Unrealized PnL in USD (negative if loss, positive if profit) approximated against the latest mark price, expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

updatedAt.description: Position last updated timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

wasDeleveraged.description: Whether the position has any associated deleverage records

createdAt.description: Fill creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

feeUsd.description: The charged fee in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

filled.description: Quantity filled in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

price.description: Fill price expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

realizedPnl.description: Realized PnL from the fill in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

reduceOnly.description: Indicates if the fill is reduce only

side.description: Direction of the fill as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

cost.description: Position cost at the time of liquidation in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

createdAt.description: Position liquidation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

fundingChargeUsd.description: Funding charged in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9), undefined if not liquidated due to funding

liquidationPrice.description: Liquidation mark price in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

positionId.description: Id representing the position that was liquidated

positionSide.description: Position side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

productId.description: Id representing the product that was liquidated

subaccountId.description: Id representing the subaccount that was liquidated

baseTokenAddress.description: Address of the base token (non-checksummed; zero address if virtual)

baseTokenName.description: Name of the base token (e.g. BTC in BTCUSD)

blockNumber.description: Block number this product was registered on

createdAt.description: Product creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

cumulativeFundingUsd.description: Cumulative funding in USD of the product (precision: 9)

displayTicker.description: Product display ticker based on the base quote token

engineType.description: The corresponding engine type this product was registered with

fundingBaselineApr.description: Funding baseline APR expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

fundingClampApr.description: Funding clamp APR expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

fundingMaxApr.description: Maximum funding APR expressed as a decimal, e.g. 2.0 = 200% (precision: 9)

fundingRate1h.description: Last computed hourly funding rate expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

fundingUpdatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when funding was last updated

lotSize.description: Quantity must be divisible by the lotSize in expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

makerFee.description: Fee charged to the maker on order trades expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

maxLeverage.description: Maximum leverage allowed for the product

maxOpenInterestUsd.description: Max OI of one side in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

maxPositionNotionalUsd.description: Max position notional value, in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

maxPrice.description: Max price in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

maxQuantity.description: Max quantity per order in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

minPrice.description: Min price in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

minQuantity.description: Deprecated. Use lotSize instead. This value is always equal to lotSize.

onchainId.description: The productId generated onchain after registering for the first time

openInterest.description: OI of both sides in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

quoteTokenName.description: Name of the quote token (e.g. USD in BTCUSD)

takerFee.description: Fee charged to the taker on order trades expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

tickSize.description: Minimum price increment (tickSize) expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

ticker.description: Product ticker based on the base quote token

volume24h.description: 24h volume in base token native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

fundingRate1h.description: Funding rate expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

fundingRateProjected1h.description: Projected funding rate expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

data.description: List of rate limit endpoint configurations

remainingUsage.description: Number of remaining times the code can be claimed

code.description: The referee's referral code to be shared and claimed by others (undefined if not activated)

codeUsageRemaining.description: Number of remaining times the referral code can be claimed

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when this referral was activated (ms since Unix Epoch)

refereeTotalPoints.description: Total points (excl. referral points) earned by the referee since referee claimed the code (precision: 9)

referrer.description: Address of the referrer (non-checksummed; undefined if not set)

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

nonce.description: Message nonce timestamp (nanoseconds since Unix Epoch)

sender.description: Account address that produced the authorizing signature

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

nonce.description: Message nonce timestamp (nanoseconds since Unix Epoch)

sender.description: Account address that produced the authorizing signature

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

blockNumber.description: Block number the signer has been linked on. Undefined means it has not be processed

createdAt.description: Link signer submission timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

expiresAt.description: Signer expiry timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

linkedAt.description: Onchain linkage timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

name.description: Optional name for the linked signer

revokedAt.description: Onchain revocation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

revokedBlockNumber.description: Block number the signer has been revoked on. Undefined means it has not be processed

signer.description: Address of the signer linked with the subaccount (non-checksummed)

StopPriceType.description: Type of stop price (stop orders only)

amount.description: Token balance in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

available.description: Portion of balance transferrable in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

tokenAddress.description: ERC20 deposited token address (non-checksummed, zero address if virtual)

tokenName.description: The unique exchange defined token name driven by addToken onchain

totalUsed.description: Portion of balance non-transferrable in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

updatedAt.description: Token balance last updated timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

account.description: Address of the account which registered the subaccount (non-checksummed)

createdAt.description: Subaccount creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

createdBlockNumber.description: Block number this subaccount was created on

name.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

registeredBlockNumber.description: Block number this subaccount was registered on

SubmitCreatedCode.description: Result codes for orders that were created (may still have been rejected)

SubmitFailedCode.description: Result codes for orders that failed to be created (outright failure)

SubmitOrderCreatedDto.description: Response returned when order is successfully submitted

clientOrderId.description: Client-provided order id (if supplied in request)

filled.description:
Quantity filled expressed as a decimal string (precision: 9)

**Deprecated:** This value is always zero when block execution is enabled.

result.description: Result code indicating the outcome of the submission

SubmitOrderCreatedResultCode.description: Code indicating the result of the submission

SubmitOrderDto.description: Submit order request containing signature and order data

data.description: Order data, either a market order or a limit order distinguished by the `type` field

signature.description: Hex-encoded EIP-712 signature authorizing this request

SubmitOrderFailedResultCode.description: Code indicating the reason for failure

clientOrderId.description: A subaccount scoped unique client-generated order id (either a UUID or alphanumeric string up to 32 characters)

close.description: Order closes the entire current position, requires zero quantity and reduceOnly

expiresAt.description: Order expiry timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch), defaults to the maximum allowed value: signedAt + 6652800

groupContingencyType.description: Contingency type for order groups: OTO (Order-Triggers-Order) or OCO (One-Cancels-Other)

groupId.description: Group Id (UUID) for linking orders together in OCO/OTO relationships

nonce.description: Message nonce timestamp (nanoseconds since Unix Epoch)

onchainId.description: Onchain product ID, available from the products endpoint

postOnly.description: Only add order if it does not immediately fill

price.description: Limit price expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

quantity.description: Non-directional quantity of product in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

reduceOnly.description: Whether this should be a reduce-only order. Must be true when close is true

sender.description: Account address that produced the authorizing signature

side.description: Side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

stopPrice.description: Stop price expressed as a decimal (precision: 9), requires stopType

stopType.description: Stop type, either 0 (take-profit) or 1 (stop-loss), requires non-zero stopPrice

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

timeInForce.description: How long an order will remain until executed/expired

clientOrderId.description: A subaccount scoped unique client-generated order id (either a UUID or alphanumeric string up to 32 characters)

close.description: Order closes the entire current position, requires zero quantity and reduceOnly

expiresAt.description: Order expiry timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch), defaults to the maximum allowed value: signedAt + 6652800

groupContingencyType.description: Contingency type for order groups: OTO (Order-Triggers-Order) or OCO (One-Cancels-Other)

groupId.description: Group Id (UUID) for linking orders together in OCO/OTO relationships

nonce.description: Message nonce timestamp (nanoseconds since Unix Epoch)

onchainId.description: Onchain product ID, available from the products endpoint

quantity.description: Non-directional quantity of product in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

reduceOnly.description: Whether this should be a reduce-only order. Must be true when close is true

sender.description: Account address that produced the authorizing signature

side.description: Side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

signedAt.description: Message signedAt current timestamp (seconds since Unix Epoch)

stopPrice.description: Stop price expressed as a decimal (precision: 9), requires stopType

stopType.description: Stop type, either 0 (take-profit) or 1 (stop-loss), requires non-zero stopPrice

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

time.description: Current system timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

addedBlockNumber.description: Block number when the token was added

address.description: Address of the token (non-checksummed; zero address if virtual)

createdAt.description: Token creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

depositEnabled.description: Whether the token is enabled for deposit

depositFee.description: Amount of native units charged on deposit expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

erc20Decimals.description: ERC20 token decimals (available if not virtual)

erc20Name.description: ERC20 token name (available if not virtual)

erc20Symbol.description: ERC20 token symbol (available if not virtual)

lzOftAddress.description: LayerZero OFT address of the token (non-checksummed; if has LZ OFT or adapter, zero address if not)

minDeposit.description: Min deposit amount as native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

name.description: The unique exchange defined token name driven by addToken onchain

removedBlockNumber.description: Block number when the token was removed (undefined if not removed)

withdrawEnabled.description: Whether the token is enabled for withdraw

withdrawFee.description: Amount of native units charged on withdraw expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp of the aggregated points periods (ms since Unix Epoch)

createdAt.description: Trade creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

filled.description: Quantity filled in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

makerClientOrderId.description: Client-generated order id of the maker order

makerFeeUsd.description: Maker fee in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

makerSide.description: Maker side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

productId.description: Id of product the trade was made against

takerClientOrderId.description: Client-generated order id of the taker order

takerFeeUsd.description: Taker fee in USD expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

takerSide.description: Taker side as either BUY (0) or SELL (1)

amount.description: Amount of tokens transferred in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

createdAt.description: Transfer creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

fee.description: Fee paid for the transfer in native units expressed as a decimal (precision: 9)

finalizedBlockNumber.description: Block number the transfer was completed on

finalizedTransactionHash.description: Transaction hash for the finalization of the transfer

initiatedBlockNumber.description: Block number the transfer was initiated on

initiatedTransactionHash.description: Transaction hash for the initiation of the transfer

lzDestinationAddress.description: LayerZero destination address (leading 0x bytes32 encoded) for the transfer (if withdraw)

lzDestinationEid.description: LayerZero destination endpoint ID for the transfer (if withdraw)

tokenName.description: The unique exchange defined token name driven by addToken onchain

amount.description: Amount of asset transferred expressed as a decimal

createdAt.description: Withdraw creation timestamp (ms since Unix Epoch)

finalizedBlockNumber.description: Block number the withdraw was completed on

initiatedBlockNumber.description: Block number the withdraw was initiated on

lzDestinationEid.description: LayerZero destination endpoint ID for the transfer (if withdraw)

subaccount.description: Bytes32 encoded subaccount name (0x prefix, zero padded)

withdrawDigest.description: Bytes32 hash of the withdraw data (with 0x prefix)

message.description: Error code indicating the reason for failure
